title: Desert Loop 2025
subtitle: Las Vegas, Grand Canyon, Page, Bryce, Zion, and the road between them.
description: A future road trip designed around long views, sunrise stops, and the contrast between neon nights and red-rock mornings.
intro: This one is still open-ended, so the journal frames a route rather than a finished memory. The structure is here; the details will arrive later.

days.title: Las Vegas arrival
days.note: Land, pick up the car, settle in, and let the city set up the contrast for everything that follows.

stops.title: Airport arrival
description: Touch down and reset to road-trip mode.

stops.title: Rental car center
description: Pick up the car and get supplies.

stops.title: First night in Las Vegas
description: A neon-heavy opening scene before the landscape takes over.

days.title: Hoover Dam to Grand Canyon
days.note: A transition day with a strong sense of scale, moving from engineered spectacle to geological vastness.

stops.title: Hoover Dam
description: An early major stop before the road opens wider.

stops.title: Route 66 diner break
description: Classic roadside energy and an easy midday reset.

stops.title: Grand Canyon viewpoints
description: Late light and the first big canyon overlooks.

days.title: Desert View, Antelope Canyon, Page
days.note: A tighter day of landmark stops, where timing matters a little more and the photography potential climbs quickly.

stops.title: Desert View Watchtower
description: Start with a built frame for the landscape.

stops.title: Lower Antelope Canyon
description: The most time-sensitive and guided portion of the route.

stops.title: Horseshoe Bend
description: A high-impact overlook to close the day.

days.title: Bryce Canyon lookouts
days.note: A day for layered amphitheaters, short walks, and changing rock color across the afternoon.

stops.title: Sunrise Point
description: Start early if the light is the priority.

stops.title: Bryce Amphitheater
description: The visual centerpiece of the day.

days.title: Zion hiking day
days.note: The most active day in the itinerary, where permits, energy, and weather all matter.

stops.title: Scout Lookout
description: A strong goal even without pushing farther.

stops.title: Angels Landing decision point
description: Keep flexible depending on permits and comfort.

days.title: Return drive with room for detours
days.note: A buffer day that works best when it stays a little loose. Scenic pull-offs should be allowed to win.

stops.title: Drive back toward Las Vegas
description: A long road segment with potential side stops.

stops.title: Flexible photo stops
description: Use the strongest light and the strongest feeling, not just the list.

days.title: Departure day
days.note: Return the car, leave margin for the airport, and let the trip end cleanly.

stops.title: Rental car return
description: Refuel, return, and move light again.
